Container.Name: tuvima-library
Container.Overview: Tuvima Library is a self-hosted, zero-cloud media intelligence platform. Drop your books, audiobooks, comics, movies, and TV episodes into the Watch Folder — Tuvima automatically fingerprints, identifies, enriches with metadata, and organises everything into a beautiful browser dashboard. No subscriptions, no accounts, nothing leaves your home network.

Config.Name: Dashboard Port
Config.Description: Dashboard web interface. Open http://[Unraid-IP]:5016 in your browser.

Config.Name: Engine API Port
Config.Description: Engine API. Used internally by the Dashboard; also available for external tools (e.g. custom mobile apps).

Config.Name: Watch Folder
Config.Description: Drop new media files here. Tuvima picks them up automatically and moves them to the Library Root once identified.

Config.Name: Library Root
Config.Description: Where Tuvima stores your organised media collection. Uses the folder template: {Category}/{Author}/{Title}/

Config.Name: Config Folder
Config.Description: Persistent configuration — settings, provider weights, and organisation rules. Survives container image updates.

Config.Name: Database Folder
Config.Description: SQLite database — your entire library catalogue. Survives container image updates.

Config.Name: Extra CORS Origins
Config.Description: (Optional) Comma-separated extra addresses the Dashboard is allowed to connect from. Useful if you access Tuvima from a different machine on your network. Example: http://192.168.1.50:5016
